description: Style NoteThis summer is the season of mixing it up with fusion fashion - creations by mineral are spot on when it comes to that elusive cohesive combination of trends. This dress is perfect for the contemporary woman who knows how to make head turn without losing her cool. Modern and innovative design details sets this piece above the rest. Product DescriptionLight blue sleeveless dress, has a bucket neckline, embroidered panel below the neckline with trims around it, gathers from below the bust and a flaring skirtMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash warmTumble dry low Use warm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M which measures 83 cm from the shoulder to the hem
